name: libaliased-perl
title: libaliased-perl
summary: Perl module to provide aliases of class names
description:
Perl module to provide aliases of class names
aliased is a module to alias class names to arbitrary aliases in the current
module or script, which is especially useful with classes that are in deep
class hierarchies. It is also handy if a class has been renamed.
.
Please note that this module only applies to loading object oriented modules,
not for procedural modules in general. Fortunately this is rarely necessary
in practise, since these modules support exporting of needed functions.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libaliased-perl because Perl module to provide aliases of class names.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libaliased-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libaliased-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libaliased-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
